results.question: How many unique years are recorded in the dataset?
What is the total number of readings for stress levels with a lower bound greater than 0?
List the names of all indicators whose source column contains 'United States'.
results.gold_sparql: SELECT DISTINCT ?indicatorName FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability> WHERE { ?indicator <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Indicator> . ?indicator <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/indicator_name> ?indicatorName . ?indicator <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/source_column> ?sourceColumn . FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?sourceColumn)), "united states")) }

per_seed.answer: United States
United States
United States

results.question: What are the names of indicators that have readings associated with a 'Low' stress level, and how many such readings does each indicator have?
results.expected_answer:
Safe Assets | 2946
Equity Valuation | 2469
Emerging Markets | 2447
Funding | 2215
Volatility | 2166
Credit | 2114
Other Advanced Economies | 2110
United States | 1272
OFR Financial Stress Index | 968
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?indicatorName (COUNT(?reading) AS ?readingCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability> WHERE {
  ?indicator <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Indicator> .
  ?indicator <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/indicator_name> ?indicatorName .
  ?indicator <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/indicator_has_reading> ?reading .
  ?reading <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/IndicatorReading> .
  ?reading <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/reading_has_stress_level> ?stressLevel .
  ?stressLevel <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/StressLevel> .
  ?stressLevel <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/stress_level_label> "Low" .
} GROUP BY ?indicatorName
ORDER BY DESC(?readingCount)
LIMIT 10

per_seed.sql: SELECT T2."indicator_name", COUNT(*) FROM "IndicatorReading" AS T1 JOIN "Indicator" AS T2 ON T1."indicator_id" = T2."indicator_id" JOIN "StressLevel" AS T3 ON T1."stress_level_id" = T3."stress_level_id" WHERE T3."stress_level_label" = 'Low' GROUP BY T2."indicator_name";

results.question: For each year, what is the average value of indicator readings that occurred on a 'Friday'?
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?year (AVG(xsd:float(?readingValue)) AS ?averageReadingValue) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability> WHERE {
  ?yearEntity <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Year> .
  ?yearEntity <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/year> ?year .
  ?yearEntity <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/year_contains_month> ?month .
  ?month <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Month> .
  ?month <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/month_contains_period> ?period .
  ?period <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Period> .
  ?period <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/day_of_week> "Friday" .
  ?period <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/period_has_reading> ?reading .
  ?reading <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/IndicatorReading> .
  ?reading <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/value> ?readingValue .
} GROUP BY ?year
ORDER BY ?year

per_seed.sql: SELECT T3."year", ROUND(AVG(T1."value"), 2) FROM "IndicatorReading" AS T1 JOIN "Period" AS T2 ON T1."period_id" = T2."period_id" JOIN "Year" AS T3 ON T1."year_id" = T3."year_id" WHERE T2."day_of_week" = 'Friday' GROUP BY T3."year"
all_sql_attempts: SELECT T3."year", ROUND(AVG(T1."value"), 2) FROM "IndicatorReading" AS T1 JOIN "Period" AS T2 ON T1."period_id" = T2."period_id" JOIN "Year" AS T3 ON T1."year_id" = T3."year_id" WHERE T2."day_of_week" = 'Friday' GROUP BY T3."year"

results.question: Find the indicator categories that contain indicators with readings in the '2010' decade, and count how many such indicators each category has.
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?categoryName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?indicator) AS ?indicatorCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability> WHERE {
  ?category <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/IndicatorCategory> .
  ?category <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/category_name> ?categoryName .
  ?category <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/category_includes_indicator> ?indicator .
  ?indicator <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Indicator> .
  ?indicator <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/indicator_has_reading> ?reading .
  ?reading <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/IndicatorReading> .
  ?reading <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/reading_on_period> ?period .
  ?period <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Period> .
  ?period <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/period_in_month> ?month .
  ?month <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Month> .
  ?month <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/month_in_year> ?year .
  ?year <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/type/Year> .
  ?year <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ofr-financial-stability/pred/decade> "2010" .
} GROUP BY ?categoryName
ORDER BY DESC(?indicatorCount)

per_seed.sql: SELECT T3."category_name", COUNT(DISTINCT T2."indicator_id") FROM "IndicatorReading" AS T1 JOIN "Indicator" AS T2 ON T1."indicator_id" = T2."indicator_id" JOIN "IndicatorCategory" AS T3 ON T2."category_id" = T3."category_id" JOIN "Year" AS T4 ON T1."year_id" = T4."year_id" WHERE T4."decade" = 2010 GROUP BY T3."category_name";

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table IndicatorReading: 59823 rows (from IndicatorReading.csv)
CREATE TABLE "IndicatorReading" (
  "reading_id" TEXT,
  "period_id" TEXT,
  "indicator_id" TEXT,
  "stress_level_id" TEXT,
  "value" REAL,
  "year_id" INTEGER,
  "month_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from IndicatorReading:
--   reading_id='2000-01-03__ofr_fsi', period_id='2000-01-03', indicator_id='ofr_fsi', stress_level_id='elevated', value='2.14', year_id='2000', month_id='2000-01'
--   reading_id='2000-01-03__credit', period_id='2000-01-03', indicator_id='credit', stress_level_id='low', value='0.54', year_id='2000', month_id='2000-01'

-- Table Indicator: 9 rows (from Indicator.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Indicator" (
  "indicator_id" TEXT,
  "indicator_name" TEXT,
  "category_id" TEXT,
  "source_column" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Indicator:
--   indicator_id='ofr_fsi', indicator_name='OFR Financial Stress Index', category_id='composite', source_column='OFR FSI'
--   indicator_id='credit', indicator_name='Credit', category_id='subindex', source_column='Credit'

-- Table IndicatorCategory: 3 rows (from IndicatorCategory.csv)
CREATE TABLE "IndicatorCategory" (
  "category_id" TEXT,
  "category_name" TEXT,
  "description" TEXT,
  "indicator_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from IndicatorCategory:
--   category_id='composite', category_name='Composite', description='Composite index combining all subindexes', indicator_count='1'
--   category_id='subindex', category_name='Subindex', description='Subindex contributing to the composite F', indicator_count='5'

-- Table Period: 6647 rows (from Period.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Period" (
  "period_id" TEXT,
  "date" TEXT,
  "year_id" INTEGER,
  "month_id" TEXT,
  "day_of_week" TEXT,
  "iso_weekday" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Period:
--   period_id='2000-01-03', date='2000-01-03', year_id='2000', month_id='2000-01', day_of_week='Monday', iso_weekday='1'
--   period_id='2000-01-04', date='2000-01-04', year_id='2000', month_id='2000-01', day_of_week='Tuesday', iso_weekday='2'

-- Table Year: 27 rows (from Year.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Year" (
  "year_id" INTEGER,
  "year" INTEGER,
  "decade" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Year:
--   year_id='2000', year='2000', decade='2000'
--   year_id='2001', year='2001', decade='2000'

-- Table Month: 316 rows (from Month.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Month" (
  "month_id" TEXT,
  "year_id" INTEGER,
  "month_number" INTEGER,
  "month_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Month:
--   month_id='2000-01', year_id='2000', month_number='1', month_name='January'
--   month_id='2000-02', year_id='2000', month_number='2', month_name='February'

-- Table StressLevel: 4 rows (from StressLevel.csv)
CREATE TABLE "StressLevel" (
  "stress_level_id" TEXT,
  "stress_level_label" TEXT,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER,
  "reading_count" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from StressLevel:
--   stress_level_id='negative', stress_level_label='Negative (calm)', lower_bound='-999', upper_bound='0', reading_count='36450'
--   stress_level_id='low', stress_level_label='Low', lower_bound='0', upper_bound='2', reading_count='18707'

--   Indicator.indicator_id -> IndicatorReading.reading_id
--   IndicatorCategory.category_id -> Indicator.indicator_id
